SHORT NAME: OTHR_TROOP_AMOUNT_IND 

LONG NAME: OTHR_TROOP_AMOUNT_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: B = the amount reported in Other TrOOP field contains both IRASA and non-IRASA Other TrOOP 
amounts 
S = the amount reported in Other TrOOP contains only IRASA Other TrOOP amount 
Null/missing = Not applicable. The amount reported in Other TrOOP contains only non-IRASA Other 
TrOOP amount, if any 

COMMENT: Effective January 1, 2023, the Inflation Reduction
